description: You are a flight dynamics analyst. Reconstruct the SATNAV-42 spacecraft's trajectory using the operations log provided at ~/Desktop/ops_log_satnav42.txt. Create and run a GMAT script at ~/Documents/missions/trajectory_reconstruction.script that configures the spacecraft, force model, and the three impulsive maneuvers in the Local/VNB frame as specified in the log. The mission must propagate to the final epoch of 16 Jun 2025 00:00:00.000 UTCG. Output the final Keplerian state (SMA, ECC, INC, RAAN, AOP, TA in that exact order) to ~/GMAT_output/reconstructed_state.txt.
